name: textbook-view
description: Deliver a lecture as a textbook-view presentation — A4-style reading column with scroll, plus free mode (scaled page overview + margin notes). Ships an author-editable <TextbookView> into src/lesson/textbook-view — no new npm dependencies.

skill.loadWhen: the lecture should use a textbook view — dense self-study prose, A4 reading column, scroll, and free-mode margin notes
